# Startup Context Payload

Startup routing payload returned when an agent needs the minimum safe context for entering or resuming work in a repository.

- Source schema: `src/agentic_workspace/contracts/schemas/startup_context.schema.json`
- Generated by: `scripts/generate/generate_schema_reference.py`

| `next_safe_action.forbidden_actions` | array of string | yes |  | Actions forbidden by this packet until a newer compact packet supersedes it. |  |  |

| `next_safe_action.proof_required` | boolean | yes |  | Whether proof is required before claiming the next action is complete. |  |  |
| `next_safe_action.completion_claim_allowed` | boolean | yes |  | Whether the packet permits claiming completion at the current claim level. |  |  |

| `acceptance` | object | no |  | Definition-of-done expectations inferred from task intent for selector-first startup drill-down. |  |  |

| `intent_evidence` | object | no |  | Compact provenance and assumption evidence for the current task intent, including source chain, correction point, and clarification/proceed posture. |  |  |

| `intent_satisfaction_matrix` | object | no |  | Compact satisfaction matrix shape that maps active intent items to evidence, gaps, and the honest completion claim level. |  |  |
